title: Understanding the Associative Property
text: The associative property of addition states that the way in which numbers are grouped in an addition problem does not change the sum. This means that $$a+b+c$$ is the same as $$a+b+c$$.

title: Applying the Associative Property
text: To apply the associative property to the expression $$1+5+7$$, try regrouping the numbers. Think about how you can change the grouping without changing the sum.

title: Regrouping the Expression
text: Rewrite the expression $$1+5+7$$ by changing the grouping of the numbers.

title: Checking Your Work
text: After regrouping the expression, calculate the sum to ensure it remains the same. What is the sum of $$1+5+7$$?

title: Calculating the Sum
text: Calculate the sum of the expression $$1+5+7$$.
